author: Augustine of Hippo
book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
Election is for the Purpose of Holiness.
title: Election is for the Purpose of Holiness.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: Chapter 35 [XVIII.]—Election is for the Purpose of Holiness.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: Who can hear the apostle saying, “Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us in all spiritual blessing in the heavens in Christ; as He has chosen us in Him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and without spot in His sight; in love predestinating us to the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to Himself according to the good pleasure of His will, wherein He hath shown us favour in His beloved Son; in whom we have redemption through His blood, the remission of sins according to the riches of His grace, which hath abounded to us in all wisdom and prudence; that He might show to us the mystery of His will according to His good pleasure, which He hath purposed in Himself, in the dispensation of the fulness of times, to restore all things in Christ, which are in heaven, and in the earth, in Him: in whom also we have obtained a share, being predestinated according to the purpose; who worketh all things according to the counsel of His will, that we should be to the praise of his glory;”—who, I say, can hear these words with attention and intelligence, and can venture to have any doubt concerning a truth so clear as this which we are defending?

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: God chose Christ’s members in Him before the foundation of the world; and how should He choose those who as yet did not exist, except by predestinating them?

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: Therefore He chose us by predestinating us.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: Would he choose the unholy and the unclean?

verses.book: A Treatise on the Predestination of the Saints.
verses.text: Now if the question be proposed, whether He would choose such, or rather the holy and unstained, who can ask which of these he may answer, and not give his opinion at once in favour of the holy and pure?
